name: Dockerized Thug
description: Dockerized [Thug](https://github.com/buffer/thug) to analyze malicious web content. Tool: https://hub.docker.com/r/honeynet/thug/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #593 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Dockerized Thug output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Dockerized Thug output file to parse instead of running it live.
